qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rapid Access Service (RAS) allows Digital Research Alliance of Canada users to access modest quantities of resources immediately to experiment and start their work.

qa_pairs.question: Who is eligible to access resources through the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: Any Digital Research Alliance of Canada user with an Alliance account can access RAS, and Primary Investigators (PIs) with a current Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) allocation can also request RAS resources.

qa_pairs.question: When would a user typically apply for the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) instead of using RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: Users apply to the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) when they require larger quantities of resources than what RAS provides.

qa_pairs.question: What are cloud instances also known as?
qa_pairs.answer: Cloud instances are also known as virtual machines or VMs.

qa_pairs.question: What are the two main types of cloud instances available?
qa_pairs.answer: The two main types of cloud instances available are compute instances and persistent instances.

qa_pairs.question: What are the key characteristics of compute instances?
qa_pairs.answer: Compute instances have a limited life-time (wall-time), typically have constant high CPU requirements, and are sometimes referred to as batch instances.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum wall-time for a compute instance?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum wall-time for a compute instance is one month.

qa_pairs.question: What happens when a compute instance reaches its life-time limit?
qa_pairs.answer: Upon reaching its life-time limit, a compute instance will be scheduled for deactivation, and its owner will be notified to clean it up and download any required data.

qa_pairs.question: What are persistent instances designed for and what are their typical use cases?
qa_pairs.answer: Persistent instances are meant to run indefinitely, typically for services like Web servers and database servers, and generally use less CPU power than compute instances.

qa_pairs.question: What vGPU flavour is offered for RAS use on Arbutus?
qa_pairs.answer: Arbutus currently offers the g1-12vgb-c3-35gb-125 vGPU flavour, which includes H100 GPUs, for RAS use.

qa_pairs.question: What are the specifications of the g1-12vgb-c3-35gb-125 vGPU flavour?
qa_pairs.answer: This vGPU flavour has 12GB GPU memory, 3 vCPUs, 35GB of memory, and 125GB of ephemeral storage.

qa_pairs.question: Who can request cloud RAS allocations?
qa_pairs.answer: Only Primary Investigators (PIs) can request cloud RAS allocations.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of vCPUs for compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of vCPUs for compute instances under RAS is 80.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of vCPUs for persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of vCPUs for persistent instances under RAS is 25.

qa_pairs.question: What is the vGPU limit for RAS users?
qa_pairs.answer: RAS users are limited to 1 vGPU.

qa_pairs.question: What is the shared persistent storage limit for a PI under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: A PI under RAS has a shared persistent storage limit of 10 TB per storage type, shared between compute and persistent allocations.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for cloud RAS allocations?
qa_pairs.answer: The default duration for cloud RAS allocations is 1 year, aligning with the RAC allocation period of April-March.

qa_pairs.question: When do cloud RAS allocations typically renew?
qa_pairs.answer: Cloud RAS allocations typically renew in April.

qa_pairs.question: Are cloud RAS allocation renewals guaranteed?
qa_pairs.answer: No, cloud RAS allocation renewals are not guaranteed as they are based on available resources.

qa_pairs.question: Can users request an increase beyond the default limits for instances, volumes, or volume snapshots under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, these limits are metadata quotas and not hard limits, so users can request an increase beyond these values without a RAC request.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user request the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can request RAS by filling out the provided online form.
